summary: Comprehensive testing of RingRing app completed. All backend APIs pass (27/28 tests, 1 skipped). Frontend UI fully functional with dark neon glassmorphism theme. Voice/Video calling buttons work (Sinch SDK triggers correctly), GIF picker with Klipy API works with 'Powered by Klipy' attribution visible, all navigation flows work.

fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error causing 500 response

critical_code_review_comments: SINCH_APP_KEY and SINCH_APP_SECRET have the same value in .env - this appears intentional but should be verified with Sinch dashboard
Call recipient mapping uses placeholder user.id instead of actual recipient - documented as TODO in code
WebSocket connection shows warning on initial load but reconnects properly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested successfully. Key areas verified: Auth (login/logout/session), Phone numbers (claim/display), Messages (conversations/send), GIF picker (Klipy API with attribution), Voice/Video call buttons (Sinch SDK initialization triggers 'Placing voice call...' toast), Contacts CRUD, Voicemail (empty state), Settings page, Navigation, Mobile responsive design. The /api/calls/log endpoint had a MongoDB _id serialization bug that was fixed.

phone_numbers.my_numbers: PASS - Shows +12085686579 with LOCAL, Active, SMS, VOICE badges

messaging.media_buttons: PASS - Photo, GIF, Voice, Video buttons present
messaging.gif_picker: PASS - Klipy API with 'Powered by Klipy' attribution

calling.sinch_sdk_script: PASS - Loaded from CDN in index.html

settings.profile: PASS - Avatar color picker, display name editable
